DataRequest.techniqueName: Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol: Exfiltration Over Symmetric Encrypted Non-C2 Protocol
DataRequest.Name: Large Outbound Transfer / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects a large outbound transfer (larger than 500MB in 10 minutes) from an internal host to an external destination

SubPattern.name: LargeXfer
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: reptDevIpAddr IN (Group@PH_SYS_DEVICE_FIREWALL) AND eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND srcIpAddr IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET) AND destIpAddr NOT IN (Group@PH_SYS_NETWORK_ENTERPRISE_INTERNAL_NET)
